news.headline: Crown Castle reschedules Q4 2024 results release to March 13, 2025, after the market closes, due to strategic review demands. Conference call set for March 13, 2025 at 5:00 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Houston, March 12, 2025 - Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE: CCI) has announced rescheduling the release of its Q4 2024 results to Thursday, March 13, 2025, following the market closure. The company is reviewing strategic alternatives for its Fiber segment, resulting in the rescheduling of the conference call to Thursday, March 13, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. EST. This move comes amidst significant demands related to the strategic review.

news.headline: NFL Insider Jay Glazer joins Auragens as board advisor in Panama; collaborating to send U.S. military vets for treatments.
news.summary: A collaboration between Auragens Stem Cell Center and Jay Glazer of NFL on FOX has been announced, aiming to provide life-changing treatments in Panama for U.S. military veterans. The initiative seeks to offer beneficial services to veterans, with a focus on stem cell treatments. This partnership underscores the commitment to assist veterans in improving their quality of life.

news.headline: Royal Gold will participate in Renmark Financial Communications' virtual non-deal roadshow on March 26, 2025 in Denver.
news.summary: Royal Gold will be joining the Renmark Financial Communications Virtual Non-Deal Roadshow Series on Wednesday, March 26, 2025. This event aims to enhance awareness on the company's latest updates and performance to potential investors. The virtual roadshow is part of Royal Gold's strategic initiatives to engage with a wider audience and showcase its investment opportunities. This participation reflects the company's commitment to transparency and effective communication with stakeholders.

news.headline: BrightView announces $8.8 million cash dividend on Preferred Stock, payable on April 1, 2025, for the period Dec 31,2024-Mar 30, 2025.
news.summary: In Blue Bell, Pennsylvania, BrightView Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BV) which is a prominent commercial landscaping services company in the U.S., stated that its Board of Directors approved a cash dividend of $8.8 million on the Series A Preferred Stock. This dividend is for the duration from December 31, 2024, to March 30, 2025, and will be distributed on April 1, 2025, to shareholders noted in the record by March 15, 2025. This declaration stands as the fifth successive dividend announcement by the company.

news.headline: Kewaunee Scientific Corp reports Q3 sales of $67.17M, up - summary of results for 2025.
news.summary: In Statesville, North Carolina, on March 12, 2025, Kewaunee Scientific Corporation (NASDAQ: KEQU) revealed the outcomes for its third quarter concluded on January 31, 2025. The sales for this period reached $67,167,000, showcasing growth compared to previous data.

news.headline: American Century Investments to liquidate Low Volatility ETF (LVOL) on April 22, 2025; ceasing trading on NYSE Arca.
news.summary: In Kansas City, Missouri on March 12, 2025, American Century Investments® revealed their decision to shut down and dissolve the American Century Low Volatility ETF (LVOL). Trading of LVOL on the NYSE Arca, Inc. will come to an end at the market's close on April 22, 2025. Following this date, the fund will undergo liquidation.

news.headline: Intel appoints Lip-Bu Tan as CEO, effective March 18, in Santa Clara, California.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, Intel Corporation has recently disclosed the appointment of Lip-Bu Tan as the new chief executive officer, with his tenure commencing on March 18.

news.headline: Deluxe (NYSE: DLX) executives to present at Sidoti Investor Conference on March 19 at 2:30 pm ET. Register online to join.
news.summary: Deluxe, a Payments and Data company listed on NYSE as DLX, shared news today about Barry McCarthy, President and CEO, and Chip Zint, Senior VP and CFO, speaking at the Sidoti March Virtual Investor Conference on March 19 at 2:30 pm ET. To attend the event virtually, interested individuals can register and access the live webcast through the company’s investor relations website at www.investors.deluxe.com. This opportunity provides insight into the company's financial updates and future strategies.

news.headline: SES AI Corp (NYSE: SES) receives notice from NYSE for non-compliance due to Class A stock closing at < $1.00/share over 30 days.
news.summary: SES AI Corporation, a prominent player in AI-driven Li-Metal and Li-ion battery production, disclosed today that it was notified by the New York Stock Exchange on March 7, 2025, about its non-compliance with Section 802.01C of the NYSE Listed Company Manual. This was due to its Class A common stock's average closing price falling below $1.00 per share over a 30-day span. SES AI is listed on the NYSE under the symbol SES and is known for its innovative approach in battery technology.

news.headline: Build-A-Bear Workshop increases quarterly cash dividend by 10% to $0.22 per share. Dividend paid on April 10, 2025.
news.summary: In St. Louis, Build-A-Bear Workshop, Inc. (NYSE: BBW) revealed a 10% boost in its quarterly cash dividend to $0.22 per share for all existing common stockholders. The dividend will be distributed on April 10, 2025, to shareholders of record by March 27, 2025. Established in 1997, Build-A-Bear has transformed into a cherished multi-generational brand with a mission to "add a little more h."

news.headline: Vince Holding Corp. CFO John Szczepanski steps down, to be replaced by Yuji Okumura as Interim CFO. Transition effective March 28, 2025.
news.summary: In New York, Vince Holding Corp. (NYSE: VNCE), a global contemporary retailer, revealed that John Szczepanski will resign as Chief Financial Officer to pursue a new opportunity on March 28, 2025. Yuji Okumura, the company's Vice President, Controller, will then become the Interim Chief Financial Officer. Szczepanski's departure will prompt Okumura to take on the new role. The company expressed gratitude for Szczepanski's contributions and wished him well in his future endeavors.

news.headline: PHX Minerals Inc. reports financial results for Q4-2024, with net income rising to $20 million.
news.summary: Fort Worth, TX - On March 12, 2025, PHX MINERALS INC., known as "PHX" (NYSE: PHX), released its financial and operational performance data for the quarter and full year concluding on Dec. 31, 2024. Among the results for the quarter and year ended on Dec. 31, 2024, the Company disclosed its net income for the fourth quarter.

news.headline: OPW Retail Fueling releases the 68EZSB Reconnectable Swivel Breakaway with a new design.
news.summary: The 68EZSB Reconnectable Swivel Breakaway has been launched by OPW Retail Fueling, a subsidiary of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a top player in fluid-handling solutions, based in Downers Grove, Illinois. This latest iteration boasts a compact and lightweight build, enhancing usability.

news.headline: MGM Resorts adds NBCUniversal's Donna Langley to board, making her 13th member. Las Vegas, Mar 12, 2025.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, MGM Resorts International (NYSE: MGM) announced the appointment of Dame Donna Langley, Chairman of NBCUniversal Entertainment & Studios, to its Board of Directors. Langley will be the 13th member of the board.

news.headline: Nektar Therapeutics reports Q4 2024 financials: Cash & investments at $269.1 million vs. $329.4 million.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Nektar Therapeutics (Nasdaq: NKTR) announced its financial performance for the fourth quarter ending December 31, 2024. As of December 31, 2024, the company's cash and investments in marketable securities amounted to $269.1 million, down from $329.4 million previously.

news.headline: AAOS awards excellence in orthopaedics with 2025 Humanitarian, Diversity, and Leadership Awards. Highlighting contributions to surgery.
news.summary: In San Diego on March 12, 2025, the American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons (AAOS) unveiled the winners of the 2025 awards, commending exceptional achievements in orthopaedic surgery. The individuals who received the Humanitarian Award, among other accolades, were celebrated for their contributions to the field.

news.headline: First Horizon Corp. (NYSE: FHN) will reveal Q1 financial results on April 16, 2025, at 6:30 am ET/5:30 am CT.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in Memphis, Tennessee, it was announced that First Horizon Corporation (NYSE: FHN) is scheduled to disclose its first quarter financial performance on April 16, 2025. Interested parties can access the news release and additional materials on ir.firsthorizon.com at around 6:30 am ET/5:30 am CT. Stay tuned for updates from FHN.

news.headline: FreightCar America releases Q4 and full year 2024 results.
Armada Hoffler has announced a revised quarterly cash dividend on common shares.
news.summary: The corporation has adjusted the cash dividend paid out to common shareholders for the quarter. The dividend, previously set at $0.50 per share, has now been revised to $0.40 per share. This change reflects the company's reassessment of its financial position and dividend distribution strategy. Shareholders will receive the reduced dividend amount in the upcoming payment period. This adjustment may impact investors and influence the stock's performance in the market.

news.headline: Trump Trade Adviser Navarro: I am seeing a healthy decline in mortgage rates.

Registration open for Tribe Public webinar "Keys To The Kingdom" featuring Indaptus Therapeutics’ CEO on March 17, 2025. Event starts at 9:00am PT/12:00pm ET. Visit INDP-KEYS.TribePublic.com to register.
news.summary: Indaptus Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: INDP) has disclosed that its CEO, Jeffrey Meckler, is slated to speak at Tribe Public’s Webinar Presentation and Q&A Event called “Keys To The Kingdom: Unlocking The Power Of Your Immune System.” The event is set to commence at 9:00am pacific/12:00pm eastern on Monday, March 17, 2025. Those interested in attending can register for free by visiting the Tribe Public LLC website at INDP-KEYS.TribePublic.com.

news.headline: Tarsus plans $100M public offering of common stock with a 30-day option to purchase $15M more shares.
news.summary: Tarsus Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: TARS) based in Irvine, California, revealed today the launch of an underwritten public offering of $100.0 million worth of its common stock. The company also plans to provide the underwriters a 30-day option to buy up to an additional $15.0 million of common stock included in the offering. Tarsus will be selling all the shares in the proposed offering. However, the completion, size, and terms of the offering are contingent on market and other factors, with no certainty on when it will be finalized.

news.headline: BoC's Gov. Macklem: We don't think the revision to Q1 growth will be that big. Q2 will most likely be weaker than we forecasted in January.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: I am not ruling out an unscheduled rate move if something severe happens suddenly.
UiPath (PATH) reports fiscal 2025 results, ending Jan 31, 2025, with new AI products - Autopilot, Agent Builder, Agentic Orchestration, and Agentic Testing.
news.summary: UiPath, Inc. reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year fiscal 2025 concluding on January 31, 2025. Identified as PATH on the NYSE, the enterprise automation and AI software company disclosed that it marked a milestone year with the introduction of cutting-edge AI capabilities. Daniel Dines, CEO of UiPath, expressed that fiscal 2025 saw the launch of innovative products like Autopilot, Agent Builder, Agentic Orchestration, and Agentic Testing.

news.headline: UiPath acquires Peak to introduce specialized agents in automation platform. Acquisition aims to enhance services.
news.summary: UiPath, based in New York, has recently made an announcement regarding the acquisition of Peak. This strategic move aims to introduce specialized agents tailored for specific industries within UiPath's automation platform. The acquisition of Peak is expected to bring a significant impact on the company's operations and services.

news.headline: A10 Networks plans to offer $200 million of convertible senior notes due 2030 in a private exempt offering.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, A10 Networks, Inc. disclosed plans to conduct a private offering of $200 million aggregate principal amount of convertible senior notes due 2030 (the “notes”). The offering, subject to market conditions and other factors, is exempt from the registration requirements of the Securities Act of 1933. The notes are intended for qualified institutional buyers and will be issued under the NYSE symbol ATEN.

news.headline: BoC's Gov. Macklem: Given that we expect tariffs to cause economic weakness and the fact that inflation is close to 2%, we felt the most appropriate course of action was to cut by 25 bps.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: Argument for staying at 3% was that growth had been stronger than we expected. Another was, why don't we wait until US trade and tariff policy are a little clearer.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: We think monetary policy right now is very much in the neutral zone.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: I do expect there will be some spillover from uncertainty into the housing market.

Calavo Growers, Inc. reports Q1 2025 financial results with $154.4M in total net sales, a 21% increase, and a net income of $4.4M. Sales in Fresh segment grow 23.7%, while Prepared segment remains stable. Fresh segment gross profit up 88.8%, reaching $12.1M. SG&A expenses decrease by 23.6%. Adjusted net income hits $5.9M, adjusted EBITDA at $9.3M. Quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 declared. Company focusing on operational efficiency and growth strategy.
news.summary: Calavo Growers, Inc. reported its financial results for Q1 ended January 31, 2025, with total net sales of $154.4 million, a 21% increase from the prior year. Fresh segment sales increased by 23.7%, while prepared segment sales remained flat. Gross profit was $15.7 million, a 46.2% increase, with Fresh segment gross profit seeing an 88.8% increase. SG&A expenses decreased by 23.6%, and net income was $4.4 million compared to a loss of $2.6 million in the prior year quarter. Adjusted net income was $5.9 million, with adjusted EBITDA of $9.3 million. The company's cash and equivalents stood at $48.5 million with $96.7 million in available liquidity. The Board declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share. Non-GAAP financial measures showed strong performance, with Fresh segment gross profit at $12.1 million and Prepared segment gross profit seeing a decline. Calavo aims to maintain compliance standards amidst regulatory investigations and continue its growth strategy.

news.headline: BoC's Gov. Macklem: Bank of Canada discussed pausing rates at 3% ahead of Wednesday's announcement.
Freehold Royalties Ltd. in Calgary reports Q4 and year-end results for 2024; provides 2025 guidance.
news.summary: Calgary, Alberta - On March 12, 2025, Freehold Royalties Ltd. (Freehold or the Company) released its fourth quarter and year-end financial results for the period ending December 31, 2024. The company's performance during this time frame was detailed, marking key highlights for investors and stakeholders. Additionally, Freehold Royalties Ltd. disclosed its stock market symbol as TSX: FRU, providing a clear identifier for interested parties to track its performance.

news.headline: Cheetah Net Supply Chain Svc Inc. disclosed full-year 2024 results, Nasdaq CM: CTNT, a logistics service provider.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, on March 12, 2025, Cheetah Net Supply Chain Service Inc. (referred to as "Cheetah" or the "Company") announced its financial results for the year concluding on December 31, 2024. As a logistics and warehousing services provider listed on Nasdaq CM under CTNT, Cheetah released key information about its performance in the previous year and offered insights into its current corporate status.

news.headline: Global Credit Union and First Financial Northwest, Inc. receive final regulatory approval for Asset Sale transaction.
news.summary: An announcement was made on March 12, 2025, by Global Federal Credit Union and First Financial Northwest, Inc. regarding Global's acquisition of most assets and liabilities of First Financial Northwest Bank. This acquisition, referred to as the Asset Sale, was approved by the National Credit Union Administration. The Purchase and Assumption Agreement, dated January 10, 2024, governed the terms of this acquisition. First Financial Northwest Bank had already obtained approvals from the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation and Washington State Department of Financial Institutions. This development marks a significant milestone in the financial sector, especially for companies involved.

news.headline: ZN's PM Luxon: The NZ economy in the early stages of a cyclical recovery.
Oil-Dri Corp. of America's board declares quarterly dividends: $0.155 per share for Common Stock and $0.1165 per share for Class B Stock.
news.summary: Today in Chicago on March 12, 2025, the Board of Directors of Oil-Dri Corporation of America announced quarterly cash dividends. They declared $0.155 per share for the Company's Common Stock and $0.1165 per share for the Company's Class B Stock. The Company's Common Stock trades on the NYSE under the symbol ODC.

news.headline: Fossil Group, Inc. appoints Randy Greben as CFO, replacing Andrew Skobe. Effective March 17, 2025.
news.summary: In Richardson, Texas, on March 12, 2025, Fossil Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: FOSL) revealed the selection of Randy Greben as their new Chief Financial Officer, commencing on March 17. Greben takes over from Andrew Skobe, who was serving as the Interim Chief Financial Officer. This change in leadership marks a significant development for the company.

news.headline: Equitable Bank lowers prime rate by 25 basis points to 4.95% from 5.20%. Concentra Bank follows suit.
news.summary: In a recent development on March 12, 2025, Equitable Bank, known as Canada's Challenger Bank™, revealed a substantial decrease in its prime lending rate. The bank has decided to lower the rate by 25 basis points, bringing it down to 4.95% from the previous 5.20%. Furthermore, Equitable Bank's subsidiary, Concentra Bank, is also following suit by reducing its prime rate. These adjustments are anticipated to have a significant impact on borrowing and lending activities within the financial sector.

news.headline: Trivest sells HighGround Restoration Group to Knox Lane; terms undisclosed. Leading company in water damage restoration.
news.summary: A private equity firm, Trivest Partners LP, has sold its portfolio company HighGround Restoration Group, Inc. to Knox Lane. HighGround, based in Dallas, TX, specializes in water damage mitigation and restoration services nationwide. The sale details have not been disclosed. Trivest Discovery Fund I oversaw this transaction, focusing on investing in founder and family-owned businesses. The completion of this sale marks a significant development in Trivest's investment strategy.

news.headline: Ceraweek: US oil executives to meet Trump at the White House next week, to discuss tariffs, trade, and LNG exports - American Petroleum Institute.

electroCore reports record net sales of $25.2M in 2024, up 57% from 2023. Net loss decreases by 37% to $11.9M. Operating cash use down 53% to $7.0M, with $12.2M in cash reserves. Company aims for growth and profitability with expanded market presence.
news.summary: ElectroCore, Inc. reported record full year 2024 net sales of $25.2 million, a 57% increase from 2023. This growth was driven by an 85% increase in Rx gammaCoreTM sales to the VA and DoD, and a 174% increase in TruvagaTM sales. The company's net loss for 2024 was $11.9 million, a 37% reduction from 2023, with net cash used in operating activities decreasing by 53%. Cash, cash equivalents, restricted cash, and marketable securities totaled $12.2 million at the end of 2024. Gross profit for 2024 was $21.4 million with a gross margin of 85%. Total operating expenses were $33.6 million, and GAAP net loss improved to $11.9 million from $18.8 million in 2023. The company is set to host a conference call and webcast on March 12, 2025. CEO Dan Goldberger is optimistic about future growth and profitability, aiming to expand market presence and addressable market through partnerships.

news.headline: Fossil Group reported Q4 net sales of $342M, down 19%, with a loss of $16.3M; announced a turnaround plan with financial targets for 2027: net sales >$800M, adjusted operating income mid-single digits.
news.summary: Fossil Group, Inc. announced fourth quarter 2024 financial results with worldwide net sales of $342 million and an operating loss of $16.3 million. They reported a decrease in sales due to strategic exits and optimization actions, alongside SG&A savings of $100 million expected in 2025. The company's gross margin improved to 53.9%, with free cash flow of $30 million in Q4. They aim for financial targets by 2027 including net sales of over $800 million and positive free cash flow. Full year 2024 saw net sales of $1.1 billion and an operating loss of $103.9 million. The outlook for 2025 includes a mid to high teens decline in net sales and a negative low single-digit adjusted operating income margin. The Company aims to focus on its core, reduce costs, and strengthen its balance sheet.

news.headline: AAR CORP. signs component repair deal with Cebu Pacific Air for nacelle maintenance.
news.summary: AAR CORP, a prominent aviation services provider catering to commercial and government operators, MROs, and OEMs, recently disclosed a significant deal on March 12, 2025. The company revealed a multi-year contract with Cebu Pacific Air for nacelle maintenance, repair, and overhaul services. This collaboration signifies a major partnership in the industry. AAR CORP's stock is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol AIR, showcasing its strong presence in the market. This agreement underlines the company's commitment to offering top-notch services to its clients.

news.headline: Phreesia reports Q4 fiscal 2025 results; CEO Chaim Indig excited about new products. Please visit Phr for more info.
news.summary: Phreesia, Inc., an all-remote company based in Wilmington, Delaware, disclosed its financial outcomes for the fiscal fourth quarter and fiscal year concluding on January 31, 2025. The company, traded on the NYSE under the symbol PHR, expressed contentment with its robust performance during this period. CEO and Co-Founder Chaim Indig conveyed enthusiasm regarding the recent product launches that aim to enhance medication adherence and overall experiences for patients and providers.

news.headline: Synopsys SNUG Silicon Valley 2025 conference to feature talks from Arm, OpenAI, and Microsoft executives. Keynotes via livestream.
news.summary: A conference spanning two days is set to delve into the future of artificial intelligence (AI) and intelligent systems. Participants will have the opportunity to join via Livestream to hear keynote addresses from the CEO of Synopsys and the Head of Hardware at OpenAI. The event, hosted by Synopsys Inc., a company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol SNPS, is scheduled for March 12, 2025, in Sunnyvale, California. This annual flagship user group conference, SNUG Silicon, promises to offer valuable insights and discussions on the latest trends and developments in AI and intelligent systems.

news.headline: Adobe reports record Q1 results for FY2025, with revenue exceeding $5 billion. Customer-focused strategy aims for future growth.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Adobe (Nasdaq:ADBE) announced its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2025 ending on February 28, 2025. The company reaffirmed its FY2025 targets and shared insights into its customer-focused strategy prior to the upcoming Adobe Investor Meeting at Adobe Summit. Chairman Shantanu Narayen highlighted the importance of customer-focused innovation for Adobe's future success, emphasizing the development of new offerings for creators, marketing professionals, business professionals, and consumers.

news.headline: Purple Innovation to announce Q4 and full-year 2024 results on March 13, 2025 - NASDAQ: PRPL.
news.summary: Purple Innovation, Inc., a renowned comfort innovation company recognized for developing the "World's First No Pressure™ Mattress," is set to announce its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on Thursday, March 13, 2025. The company, trading on NASDAQ under the symbol PRPL, will be releasing these crucial figures to the public on that date.

news.headline: FIS to present at Bank of America Electronic Payments Symposium on Mar. 18, 2025, at 10:40 am ET. Stock symbol: FIS (NYSE). Website: www.fisglobal.com.
news.summary: Jacksonville, Florida-based FIS, a leading financial technology company traded on NYSE under the ticker symbol FIS, will be participating in the Bank of America Electronic Payments Symposium on March18, 2025, at 10:40 am ET. A live audio webcast of the presentation will be available along with a replay on FIS’ website, www.fisglobal.com. FIS offers financial solutions to various entities including financial institutions, businesses, and developers, striving to enhance the financial technology landscape.
